title: 7 Best ConvertKit Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Compare the best ConvertKit alternatives. Find free and paid email marketing tools for creators, bloggers, and businesses.
h1: 7 Best ConvertKit Alternatives for Email Marketing in 2025
intro: ConvertKit is an excellent platform for creators, but it may not be the perfect fit for everyone. Whether you're looking for more affordable pricing, different features, or specialized functionality, there are several strong alternatives worth considering. We've reviewed the top options to help you find the best email marketing platform for your needs.
why_switch: Find more affordable pricing plans starting from as low as $9/month
Access specialized features like SMS, webinars, or e-commerce integrations
Get better customer support ratings and user satisfaction scores

alternatives.name: Beehiiv
alternatives.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
alternatives.key_difference: Beehiiv is purpose-built for newsletter creators with built-in monetization, an ad network, and referral program features. With a higher free tier (2,500 subscribers) and excellent customer ratings (4.7 on G2), it's ideal if you want to grow and monetize your audience directly.

alternatives.name: MailerLite
alternatives.tagline: Simple email marketing for small businesses
alternatives.best_for: small businesses and freelancers on a budget
alternatives.key_difference: MailerLite offers the lowest paid-tier pricing at $9/month while maintaining powerful features like automation, landing pages, and pop-ups. Its exceptional Trustpilot rating (4.5) and user-friendly interface make it the best budget-friendly alternative.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign combines email marketing with a full CRM, advanced automation, and lead scoring capabilities. If you need sophisticated customer relationship management alongside email marketing, this all-in-one platform eliminates the need for multiple tools.

alternatives.name: Brevo
alternatives.key_difference: Brevo stands out with an exceptional free tier (100,000 subscribers) and multi-channel capabilities including SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat. It's the best choice if you need to reach customers across multiple communication channels beyond email.

alternatives.name: Mailchimp
alternatives.key_difference: Mailchimp offers a completely free plan with solid automation and A/B testing features for up to 500 subscribers. As an established platform since 2001 with extensive integrations, it's the safest choice for beginners wanting to start at zero cost.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Brevo offers the most generous free tier with 100,000 subscribers and multi-channel features (email, SMS, WhatsApp). If you prefer a more traditional email marketing approach, Mailchimp and MailerLite both offer robust free plans with up to 500-1,000 subscribers and powerful automation features.

faq.q: What is the best ConvertKit alternative for small business?
faq.a: MailerLite is ideal for small businesses, combining affordability ($9/month starting price), ease of use, and excellent customer support. For businesses needing CRM functionality, ActiveCampaign provides advanced automation and customer relationship tools at a comparable price point.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, MailerLite starts at just $9/month compared to ConvertKit's $29/month minimum. Mailchimp and Brevo both offer free plans indefinitely, and GetResponse starts at $19/month, making them all more budget-friendly options depending on your subscriber count and feature needs.
